text:
Once upon a distant moonlit night, a little fox named Whiskers would sneak into the henhouse every day. She was eager to taste the delicious henhood apples.

One night during a howling storm, the brave fox got curious about what life inside would be like. She climbed onto a pile of hay.

A hen came buzzing around.

She hatched a plan.

With a leap of lightning-fast speed, she caught two apples.

Whiskers thought to herself, I'll just hide these.

Several lifetimes later...

The hen grew obsessed.

She'd lay eggs constantly.

She'd peck at apples that weren't there.

She imagined them.

And finally...

On a particularly sunny afternoon...

She pecked her last apple.

The orchard was silent.

She didn't move an eye.

In her mind...

She saw vast forests.

She heard the rustle of leaves.

She smelled the earth...

Then...

A gust of wind...

And...

It was gone.

She'd
